---

💬 Questions or want to claim this? Join the contributor chat: https://t.me/chiomagroup

**Note:** PRs against this issue must satisfy every item in Acceptance Criteria above and include a screenshot or short screen-recording (terminal output/log capture is acceptable for non-HTTP changes) demonstrating the change — PRs without this will not be merged.
